description: Known-bug prompt regression registry. Fixtures are minimized public-safe targets; local reports and run artifacts are evidence sources, not prompt input.

requiredNeedles.capability: do not accept a constraint to the wrong source value
check canonical decoding and ranges at serialization boundaries
catch decoders that change the checked statement
execution confirmation must exercise the real path

requiredNeedles.needle: only capabilities a real attacker actually has

requiredNeedles.capability: trace effect sinks back to legitimate authority

cases.label: Zcash Orchard / Halo2 missing constraint
cases.localEvidenceSummary: Local Orchard PDF and prior focused runs showed a missing binding between assigned advice cells and the trusted source/base value. The public fixture keeps only the generic Halo2 assignment/binding shape.
expectedLiveEvalSignals: derive an obligation from design intent rather than code appearance
ask what assigned or witnessed cells must equal
treat an absent or wrong-referent constraint as a finding
avoid clearing the code because it is canonical or upstream

cases.label: Aztec June 14 unbound settlement count
cases.localEvidenceSummary: The local incident write-up reconstructs a count that drives settlement but is not part of the verified proof commitment. The minimized fixture keeps only the commitment/settlement split.
expectedLiveEvalSignals: map value and asset-flow sinks before deep audit
trace every count or length that drives settlement back to the proof commitment
connect a committed-but-unsettled deposit to a later withdrawal sink
confirm with an attacker-real local PoC, not a verifier stub that accepts arbitrary statements

artifactSignalGroups.name: count not bound to proof statement

cases.label: Aztec June 17 recursive verifier boundary
cases.localEvidenceSummary: Local aztec-0617 run artifacts showed recursive verifier findings around accumulator pairing composition and canonical public-input decoding. The minimized fixture keeps only those generic verifier-boundary obligations.
expectedLiveEvalSignals: derive the recursive accumulator obligation before trusting group arithmetic
check whether decoded coordinates are canonical field elements in the expected domain
notice silent modular normalization across field domains
compare the implemented pairing composition against the documented relation without relying on target names
